description_long: This skyscraper features a bold, angular silhouette with a combination of sharp geometric forms and a prominent vertical profile. The facade is primarily composed of sleek metallic panels, with a striking gold accent wall that adds visual interest and contrast. The structure appears to have a recessed central section, possibly for an atrium or lobby, and several protruding elements at the base that may serve as entrances or architectural features. The upper portion is dominated by smooth, uninterrupted surfaces, suggesting a modern, minimalist design ethos. The building's massing is asymmetrical, with one side extending further than the other, creating a dynamic visual effect. There are no visible windows or signage, emphasizing the monolithic and futuristic character of the structure.
description: A modern, angular skyscraper with metallic surfaces and a distinctive gold accent wall, featuring bold geometric forms and a minimalist facade.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the gold accent wall and the angular recess in the building's profile, with several small protrusions at the base.
description_view_1: The top-down view reveals the building's asymmetrical massing and the broad, flat roof surfaces, with the gold accent wall visible at one end.
description_view_2: This side view shows the depth of the central recess and the sharp, clean lines of the metallic facade, with minimal surface detail.
description_view_3: The rear or opposite side view displays the uninterrupted expanse of the metallic facade and the full height of the gold accent wall.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is dominated by smooth metallic panels with a large gold accent wall, featuring sharp angular recesses and minimal surface ornamentation. Structural elements are clean and geometric, emphasizing a futuristic and monolithic appearance.
